src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0 on lists, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.
